title: salix glauca var. pseudolapponum
intro: Salix glauca var. pseudolapponum, also known as the false or alpine willow, is a variety of the Salix glauca species, a type of willow shrub that belongs to the family Salicaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent qualities. The health benefits of Salix glauca var. pseudolapponum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. Salix glauca var. pseudolapponum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
